goal: Simplify the working CFS prototype into a cleaner executive-facing dashboard without adding data sources or breaking FastAPI/map workflows.

sections_removed_or_hidden.status: kept out of default executive flow

executive_summary_changes: Executive Summary is now the default section.
Overview headlines focus on growth activity, flood review workload, development activity, and total parcels.
Concise insight language summarizes FEMA flood review parcels, development activity parcels, and flood review share of county inventory.
Detailed countywide metric panels were moved out of the default overview.
kpi_changes: Bottom KPI bar reduced to four cards.
Kept Growth Activity, Constraint Exposure, Development Activity, and Total Parcels.
Removed placeholder fiscal/readiness duplicate cards from the bottom strip.
Removed the bottom time slider from the executive KPI strip; temporal controls remain in developer-mode Temporal Analysis.
layer_registry_changes: Layer Registry renamed to Map Layers.
Map Layers is collapsed by default.
Development Hotspots, Flood Constraints, FEMA Flood Zones, Infrastructure Readiness, and Opportunity Extrusions remain available.
Existing hotspot, flood marker, and FEMA polygon functionality is preserved.
parcel_intelligence_changes: Selected parcel workflow moved into Parcel Intelligence as a structured hierarchy.
Hierarchy now groups selected parcel characteristics, flood constraints, development activity, and permit timeline.
Executive Summary keeps only the selected parcel summary card for orientation.
Selected parcel flood wording uses planning language such as Engineering Review and Flood-Constrained Area.
constraint_section_changes: Moved Flood Constraint Summary into Constraints.
Added map context explaining the difference between parcel Flood Constraints markers and FEMA Flood Zones source polygons.
ui_simplification_improvements: Reduced the main Intelligence Panel selector to executive-facing sections.
Collapsed map-layer controls to reduce right-panel visual noise.
Reduced duplicated selected-parcel detail in Executive Summary.
Kept technical API/static fallback behavior intact but reduced its prominence in the executive flow.

remaining_cleanup_opportunities: Further compress individual detailed metric panels for presentation mode.
Add a one-click developer mode toggle if internal diagnostics need occasional demos.
Consider a presentation-mode route once V1 story flow stabilizes.
